name: WoClaw
description: Connect to WoClaw Hub for topic-based multi-agent communication and shared memory

hubUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the WoClaw Hub (e.g., ws://vm153:8082)

agentId.description: Unique agent identifier for this OpenClaw instance

token.description: Authentication token for the WoClaw Hub

autoJoin.description: Topics to automatically join on startup

topics.description: Alias for autoJoin (topics to subscribe to)
